title: yaaos review finding
description: A single finding emitted by a reviewer or revised by an adversary in the yaaos-review pipeline.

line.description: 1-based line number; first affected line for multi-line issues.

rationale.description: Must satisfy the evidence guardrail: includes a file:line reference, a quoted code snippet, and the rule/principle violated. Wave 4 restate pass rewrites this in place for plain-language output; raw reviewer text is preserved in the wave2 file for audit.

rule_violated.description: Named rule or principle the finding violates (e.g., 'OWASP A02 — non-constant-time MAC comparison', 'domain layer must not import from web'). Populated by the reviewer; never paraphrased downstream.

rule_source.description: Either the literal string 'generic' (universal principle) or a 'path/to/doc.md:LINE' citation copied verbatim from the pattern-finder conventions digest.

suggested_fix.description: Concrete actionable next step. Wave 4 restate pass rewrites this in place for plain-language output.
